query: How frequently does TracXn list funding rounds for OpenAI and Anthropic - do they include secondary transactions, tranches, SPVs, small rounds? Historical monthly frequency of listed funding rounds for top AI companies in 2025-2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on how TracXn lists funding rounds for OpenAI and Anthropic:

## Key Findings

**What TracXn lists (as of ~May–July 2026 vintage):**
- OpenAI: 14 rounds, $180B cumulative
- Anthropic: 18 rounds, $132B cumulative
- Each row has date, amount, round name, and post-money valuation

**Transaction types TracXn INCLUDES as separate dated entries:**
- ✅ **Debt rounds** (both companies have conventional/convertible debt logged separately)
- ✅ **Small tranches & round extensions** — this is a major finding: OpenAI's Series F appears **three times** (Feb $122B, Mar $40M, Apr $75M 2026); Anthropic shows a $5M Series D and $50M Series E
- ✅ **Grants**, **"Others"**, and **undisclosed-amount** rounds (still dated)

**What TracXn does NOT cleanly break out:**
- ❌ **Secondary/employee tender sales** — OpenAI's documented Sept–Oct 2025 employee secondary (~$6.6B→$10.3B at $500B valuation) and SoftBank's Nov 2024 $1.5B tender are **not** distinct rows. TracXn catalogs priced primary/venture rounds and debt, not liquidity events.
- ❌ **SPVs** — folded into named series rounds, not labeled separately

**Base rate for month-specific dating:**
- Historically low but heavily clustered: rounds appear in ~11% of OpenAI's months, ~30% of Anthropic's months over full history
- **Accelerating sharply**: 2025 ≈ 1 round per company per ~4 months; Jan–Apr 2026 ≈ 1 round per company per ~1.3 months
- **Critical nuance for the caller**: a single mega-round frequently spawns 2–3 dated entries in *adjacent* months (tranche follow-ons), so a large round in month N often generates additional entries in N+1 and N+2 — materially inflating the per-month base rate during active fundraising windows

A caveat: some older entries carry only a year (not a month), and TracXn valuations occasionally diverge from company/press figures.

sources.title: OpenAI - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
sources.snippet: OpenAI has raised a total of $180B over 14 funding rounds: 1 Seed, 2 Early-Stage, 9 Late-Stage, 1 Debt and 1 Grant. Full dated table Dec 2015 through Apr 2026.

sources.title: Anthropic - 2026 Funding Rounds & List of Investors - Tracxn
sources.snippet: Anthropic has raised a total of $132B over 18 funding rounds: 2 Early-Stage, 14 Late-Stage, 1 Others and 1 Debt. Full dated table May 2021 through Apr 2026.

sources.title: OpenAI wraps $6.6 billion share sale at $500 billion valuation
sources.snippet: OpenAI finalized a secondary share sale totaling $6.6 billion allowing current and former employees to sell stock at a record $500 billion valuation.

sources.title: OpenAI boosts size of secondary share sale to $10.3 billion
sources.snippet: OpenAI increased its secondary share sale to $10.3 billion, up from $6 billion initially, for eligible current and former employees.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money.

sources.title: Anthropic raises $13B Series F at $183B post-money valuation
sources.snippet: Anthropic completed a Series F fundraising of $13 billion led by ICONIQ, valuing the company at $183 billion post-money.

sources.title: OpenAI allows employees to sell $1.5B stock to SoftBank
sources.snippet: In November 2024, SoftBank reportedly bought $1.5B of OpenAI stock from past and current employees in a tender offer.
